name: BMR Calculator
desc: Bmr Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
seo_description: Use our free bmr calculator to quickly estimate bmr_hombre, bmr_mujer based on peso_kg, height_cm, edad. Not registration needed.
result_context: The BMR muestra calories in reposo absoluto; the TDEE includes multiplicador is of actividad to expense total daily.
formula_display: Hombre: BMR = 10 × weight + 6.25 × height - 5 × edad + 5; Mujer: BMR = 10 × weight + 6.25 × height - 5 × edad - 161
steps: Apply formula Mifflin-St Jeor to hombre and mujer
Multiply BMR per 1.2 (sedentario) or 1.55 (asset) to TDEE
mistakes: Confusing BMR with TDEE (BMR is reposo total, TDEE includes actividad)
Not ajustar calories to the cambiar weight (recalcular each 5kg perdidos)
